payload.answer: Recall behaved correctly: mem_new was returned as the current memory for "Sam from Goldman." mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so it should not be presented as the active/current fact.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new because it is the non-superseded matching memory for the query entity phrase "Sam from Goldman"; mem_old was excluded because its lifecycle state indicates it has been superseded by mem_new.

entity_resolution.reason: The query phrase matched Sam with Goldman as context; among matching memories, mem_new is current while mem_old is marked superseded.
